sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 101:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 101:1
items.html: Keter consists of two phases called “a spark of the Creator” and “a spark of the created being.” The discernment of a “spark of the Creator” in it is called Atik, and it is called Tohu, after the complete absence of attainment in it. The discernment of a “spark of the created being” in it is called Arich Anpin, and Bohu, indicating the root and beginning of attainment that is there. (Part 3, Chapter 6, item 4)
